## Summary

<!-- Explain the problem and the chosen solution. -->

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck:build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm publint`
- [ ] `pnpm package:smoke`
- [ ] `pnpm docs:build`

## Review checklist

- [ ] Tests cover observable behavior changes.
- [ ] Public API and package metadata changes are documented.
- [ ] No generated `dist` files or unrelated dependency changes are included.
- [ ] Release tags and package publication are left to the release workflows.
